name: Getui
description: Chinese push notification and mobile data service (个推) serving 500k+ apps with user segmentation and SDKs.

seo.title: Getui — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Getui: Chinese push notification and mobile data service (个推) serving 500k+ apps with user segmentation and SDKs.

when_to_use: Push notifications to Chinese Android apps across OEM device fragmentation
User segmentation and behavioral push targeting for 500k+ Chinese apps
Transactional notification delivery via Getui SDK for Chinese market apps
IM and in-app messaging features using Aurora Mobile's unified SDK

pros: Essential for reliable delivery in mainland China
Handles Xiaomi, Huawei, OPPO vendor channels
Combines push with analytics and segmentation
cons: Data residency concerns for non-China apps
Dashboard and onboarding are rough for foreigners
Integrations outside China ecosystem are minimal
review.verdict: Mandatory if you ship in China — irrelevant elsewhere. Use as the China leg of a multi-provider push stack.
review.best_for: Apps with meaningful mainland China install base

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
